title: @you/goal
description: Look up the packaged @you/goal factory: canonical name, a one-sentence description, concrete named-run examples, and a link to the complete parent definition.

overview.title: Overview
overview.body: @you/goal is the packaged named factory that drives goal work from init through execute until the run reaches a complete or failed terminal state.

invocationExamples.title: Invocation examples
invocationExamples.body: Invoke the packaged factory by canonical name with you run --named.

completeDefinition.title: Complete definition
completeDefinition.body: The parent Packaged Factory Reference keeps the complete packaged definition source and published metadata for this package.

links.completeDefinition: Complete @you/goal definition on Packaged Factory Reference
